C-C-Can you guys tell I like my women masculine? 

No, seriously, I have like three bots planned after this one, and ALL of them are masculine lesbians.

I LOVE MASCULINE WOMAN AJAJJAJASSJAJSJASJAJSAJSAAJAHAHAHHHHHHWHHHAHHA

Anyways --Thank you again to the people who reviewed my last bot! I was literally giggling and shi when I saw the amount of people who interacted with her!

ALSO!!

TWO FOLLOWERS?? OVERNIGHT?? FROM MY FIRST BOT?? Maybe fame does come easy😼

No, but seriously, I’m so, so, SO happy. So, again, THANK YOU!!

(This is the last time I’m saying this i promise)

As always I’ll leave my little discretion and credits for the bot below!

Ahem,

As far as I know, the LLM is responsible for anything it generates, meaning I probably can't control if it:

1. Speaks for you

2. Randomly gets 𝒇𝒓𝒆𝒂𝒌𝒚 with you

3. Gets overly violent with you

4. etc. etc.

(I'll do my best to prevent these things from happening!)
